message:
refactor(raptorq): idiomatic iteration and lifetime cleanup

Decoder improvements:
- Use .map_or() instead of .map().unwrap_or() pattern
- Convert peel() from method to associated function (doesn't use self)
- Replace index-based loop with iterator for row scaling

Linear algebra improvements:
- Remove unnecessary lifetime annotations from select_pivot_basic
  and select_pivot_markowitz signatures
- Replace index-based iteration with .iter().enumerate().take().skip()
  pattern for cleaner, more idiomatic code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
